summary: The opening was left intact because it already enters differently from the adjacent visible opening. The seam polish focused on the chapter's ending, tightening the final movement so it hands off on Earl's counted breath and concealment rather than repeating chapter 14's in-bed, dark-room listening cadence.
edits: Removed the repeated ambient night-sounds tableau from the closing movement.
Shortened the final refrain from a doubled 'Not today' to a single beat.
Replaced the last line with Earl counting breaths to morning, preserving the same illness pressure and secrecy while giving the chapter a more distinct exit.
